code:
import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut at_word_start = true
  mut first_word = true
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        at_word_start = true
      else
        if at_word_start and not first_word
          result = "#{result} "
        end
        mut out_b = b
        if at_word_start and b >= 97 and b <= 122
          out_b = b - 32
        end
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(out_b)}"
        at_word_start = false
        first_word = false
      end
      i = i + 1
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    println(process(line))
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
